description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural, unfinished texture, suggesting it is crafted from a single piece of hardwood. The axe head is made of dark, metallic material with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced poll on the opposite side. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle, with the eye of the axe head fitting snugly around the wood. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding, indicating it is intended for practical use. The surface of the blade is smooth and glossy, contrasting with the rougher, matte finish of the handle. This tool is suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks in urban environments such as parks, gardens, or garages.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a glossy, dark metal blade, designed for practical chopping tasks. The handle is rough and natural, while the blade is smooth and sharp.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from an angled perspective, highlighting the curvature of the wooden handle and the broad, glossy blade.
description_view_1: A side profile view shows the full length of the handle and the wide, slightly curved cutting edge of the blade.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizes the width of the blade and the way it is mounted onto the handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile reveals the poll of the axe and the straight alignment of the handle with the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural, rough texture and oval cross-section, designed for a secure grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad steel blade with a slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced poll; no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade eye fitted over the handle.
